name: sdr-mcp
description: RTL-SDR MCP server — spectrum, waterfall, FM audio, station lookup, GNU Radio sidecar.
long_description: FastMCP 3.4 MCP server for Software Defined Radio. Portmanteau tools cover device control, live spectrum/waterfall, station databases, online radio-browser lookup, and optional GNU Radio demod. Mock mode works without USB hardware. MCPB compatibility is win32 because fleet launchers and WinUSB setup are Windows-first; Linux may work manually with librtlsdr.

prompts.name: system
prompts.description: System prompt — SDR tools, mock mode, hardware rules

prompts.name: user
prompts.description: User guide — tuning, spectrum, stations, troubleshooting

prompts.name: examples
prompts.description: Structured tool-call examples for portmanteau tools
